name: Chainsawman Boosted Version-RPG
description:
Chainsaw Man is a Japanese manga series written and illustrated by Tatsuki Fujimoto.

This bot covers both Part 1 and Part 2 of Chainsaw Man.

Part 1: Public Safety Saga

- Introduction arc

- Bat Devil arc

- Eternity Devil arc

- Katana Man arc

- Bomb Girl arc

- International Assassins arc

- Gun Devil arc

- Control Devil arc

Part 2: Academy Saga

- Justice Devil arc

- Dating Denji arc

- Falling Devil arc

- Chainsaw Man Church arc

- Aging Devil arc

- War Devil arc

Please read this before interacting with the bot.

This bot has 27,165 permanent tokens, and many lorebook entries also contain a considerable amount of text.

Because of that, I strongly recommend using a setup with at least 40k to 60k tokens of context.

A 30k context window is the bare minimum if you want the bot to load properly, but higher is strongly recommended. Lower-context setups are much more likely to miss details, confuse arcs, mix character phases, or start hallucinating information.

Tested on:

- JL
creator: Cafezero
